title: search_knowledge tool — function calling schema
description: Schema enviado ao LLM para function calling. tenant_id, agent_id, embedding_model NUNCA aparecem aqui — sao injetados server-side via pydantic-ai RunContext[ConversationDeps].

tool.name: search_knowledge
tool.description: Search the tenant knowledge base for relevant chunks. Use when the customer asks about FAQ, regulamento, horarios, produtos, politicas, or any tenant-specific information that is not in the system prompt. Returns at most top_k chunks ordered by cosine distance (lower = more similar).

query.description: Natural-language query that will be embedded and matched against the knowledge base. Use the customer's own words when possible.

top_k.description: Maximum number of chunks to return. Server-side hard cap is 20.

result_schema.description: List of chunks ordered by cosine distance (ascending). Empty list means no matches OR embedder unavailable (graceful degradation).

text.description: Chunk content (already validated by Safety Layer A — no prompt injection risk).

source_name.description: Logical document name as uploaded by the tenant (e.g. faq.pdf, regulamento.md).

distance.description: Cosine distance (0 = identical, 2 = orthogonal). Lower = more similar.

document_id.description: FK to documents table — useful for trace audit (not for LLM display).

server_side_injection.description: Fields that are injected by the executor (NOT by the LLM). pydantic-ai RunContext[ConversationDeps] provides them.

tenant_id.rationale: Multi-tenant isolation — RLS + injection defense in depth.

agent_id.binding: SQL parameter $2 (in WHERE agent_id IS NULL OR agent_id=$2)
agent_id.rationale: Per-agent scoping — agent sees its own chunks + shared (agent_id IS NULL).

embedding_model.rationale: Query isolation during model upgrades — only returns chunks matching the tenant's current embedding model.

embedder_unavailable.description: Bifrost /v1/embeddings returns 5xx after 3 retries OR circuit breaker open.
embedder_unavailable.behavior: Tool returns [] (empty list). Logs structured WARN event 'rag_embedder_unavailable'. Pipeline does NOT raise — agent responds without context (graceful degradation, FR-038).

kb_empty.description: Tenant has zero chunks (no documents uploaded yet).
kb_empty.behavior: SELECT returns []. Tool returns []. Logs INFO event 'rag_kb_empty'.

chunk_rejected_by_safety.description: Chunk failed Safety Layer A regex (potential prompt injection).
chunk_rejected_by_safety.behavior: Chunk is silently dropped from the result list. Logs WARN event 'rag_chunk_rejected' with chunk_id + matched pattern (no chunk content in log to avoid leaking).

attributes.rag.embedding_model: model used for the query embed
